title: Non-Amazon Scrape Wave - 2026-05-14

metadata.reason: Desktop thread full transcript export was not available; this file captures the user requests, actions, outputs, blockers, and next steps for durable project memory.

next_steps: Resume jennikayne_com later from product 545 after the HTTP 503 cool-down window.
Do not retry kimesranch_com without a new plan; the public probe returned a 403 verification response.
Continue choosing first-time, unclaimed sites that do not already have completed data or completed claims.

messages.text: Asked what was next in scraping triage, then approved the next scrape and later asked to keep going through additional sites.

Repeated and documented the Barse confirmation run. Added scrape_barse_reviews.py and barse_scrape_2026-05-14.md. The public Shopify catalog had 1,676 products, almost entirely jewelry, and public Judge.me media probes exposed no customer review image rows. Output lives under FWM_Data/non-amazon/data/step_1_raw_scraping_data/barse_com with a completed claim.
Directed that the next scrape should avoid websites with existing data, pick a website, and scrape every single product page rather than only summaries or only the URL in the sheet.

Completed Curvy Kate as a full public catalog product-page scrape. Added scrape_curvykate_reviews.py and curvykate_scrape_2026-05-14.md. Scanned all 278 public Shopify products/product pages, 173 Feefo parent SKUs, and 174 Feefo review pages. Final output has 33,446 Feefo text-review rows joined to public Shopify product-gallery images, 1,676 distinct reviews, 1,459 distinct image URLs, 0 customer review image rows, and 0 Supabase-qualified rows. Feefo media-gallery endpoint was checked across all parent SKUs and returned no public customer media.
Asked whether there was another way to get images, then approved doing it.

Expanded Curvy Kate to include all public Shopify gallery images for every product page and variant when customer review media was not available. Confirmed there were still no Supabase-qualified rows because the strict qualification requires customer review images, not catalog/gallery images.

Probed Princess Polly and deferred it rather than scraping: the catalog was too large for this turn at 15,843 products and roughly 13,375 live apparel products. Wrote a deferred-too-large claim and did not keep a product dataset.

Started Jenni Kayne as a first-time public Shopify/Yotpo scrape. Added scrape_jennikayne_reviews.py. The run stopped at HTTP 503 on product 545 of 1,100 after scanning 544 product pages and 949 Yotpo review pages. The partial output has 185 customer-image rows. Marked it blocked_partial with a revisit note to resume later from the unscanned tail.
Asked why there were no Supabase-qualified rows and whether there was a way to get review images.

Explained that Curvy Kate produced no Supabase-qualified rows because the rows had catalog/gallery images but no customer_review_image rows from Feefo. Checked the Feefo media-gallery route across all parent SKUs and found totalSize 0, so there was no public review image feed to add.
Approved moving to the next scrape and then said to keep going.

Completed Unbound Merino as a full public catalog product-page scrape. Added scrape_unboundmerino_reviews.py and unboundmerino_scrape_2026-05-14.md. Scanned all 152 public Shopify products/product pages and 509 Okendo review pages. Output has 1,412 rows, 1,126 distinct reviews, 378 distinct images, 1,296 rows with ordered size, 145 rows with parsed measurements, 0 customer review image rows, and 0 Supabase-qualified rows. Confirmed no public true customer review media was exposed in Okendo.
Probed Kimes Ranch and marked it blocked. The public catalog looked bounded in early inspection, but a deeper probe returned a 403 verification response. No output dataset was kept.

Completed BYLT Basics as a full public sitemap product-page scrape. Added scrape_byltbasics_reviews.py and byltbasics_scrape_2026-05-14.md. Scanned all 666 public product pages and 1,416 Okendo review pages. Output has 48,736 rows, 32,137 distinct reviews, 1,784 images, 9,045 ordered-size rows, 10,248 measurement rows, 0 customer review image rows, and 0 Supabase-qualified rows.
Asked to update the remote git, S3, and the transcripts table for this chat.

Prepared this focused transcript for upload to the Supabase codex_chat_transcripts table, planned to sync /Users/briannasinger/Projects/FWM_Data to the configured S3 bucket, and planned to commit only the relevant scrape wave code/docs/transcript while avoiding unrelated active claim files and scratch scripts from other work.
